zh.lifeSummary: 當Martha Baylie於1609年2月20日出生在英國素福爾可福拉苗林加姆時，她的父親Francis Baylie23歲，母親Dorothy Rossell21歲。她於1628年11月20日與Deacon Edward Collins在英國英格蘭素福爾可福拉苗林加姆結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和7個女兒的父母。她去世於1699年3月22日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼素福爾可享年90歲，埋葬在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼米德萊可哈爾斯托。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Martha Baylie于1609年2月20日出生在英国素福爾可福拉苗林加姆时，她的父亲Francis Baylie23岁，母亲Dorothy Rossell21岁。她于1628年11月20日与Deacon Edward Collins在英国英格兰素福爾可福拉苗林加姆结婚。他们至少是6个儿子和7个女儿的父母。她去世于1699年3月22日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼素福爾可享年90岁，埋葬在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼米德萊可哈爾斯托。

variants.name: Bailey
meanings: English: status name for a steward or official, from Middle English bailli ‘manager, administrator’ (Old French baillis, from Late Latin baiulivus, an adjectival derivative of baiulus ‘attendant, carrier, porter’).
English: habitational name from Bailey in Little Mitton, Lancashire, named with Old English beg ‘berry’ + lēah ‘woodland clearing’.

English: occasionally a topographic name for someone who lived by the outer wall of a castle, from Middle English (Old French) bailli ‘outer courtyard of a castle’ (Old French bail(le) ‘enclosure’, a derivative of bailer ‘to enclose’). This term became a placename in its own right, denoting a district beside a fortification or wall, as in the case of the Old Bailey in London, which formed part of the early medieval outer wall of the city.

nameMeanings.name: Martha
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, of Aramaic rather than Hebrew origin, meaning ‘lady’. It was borne by the sister of Lazarus and Mary of Bethany (John 11:1). According to Luke 10:38, when Jesus visited the house of Mary and Martha, Mary sat at his feet, listening to him, while Martha ‘was cumbered about much serving’, so that she complained to Jesus, ‘Lord, dost thou not care that my sister hath left me to serve alone?’ For this reason, the name Martha has always been associated with hard domestic work, as opposed to the contemplative life.

historicEvents.title: The Pilgrims Board the Mayflower
historicEvents.description: "The Pilgrims boarded the Mayflower in search of religious freedom in the New World in September 1620. The Mayflower set sail from Plymouth, England, with 102 passengers, 40 of whom called themselves ""Saints."" After two stormy months at sea, the ship reached the New World. Nearly half of the group died during their first winter due to malnutrition and the harsh New England winter."

historicEvents.title: The English Civil War
historicEvents.description: A series of conflicts regarding England's governance during the years 1642 to 1651 is now known as The English Civil War. Charles I summoned supporters to join him against his enemies in Parliament. In October 1642, nearly 10,000 men fought for Charles I and chased Parliament across the River Tamar. Fighting continued for years and was finally ended at the Battle of Worcester on September 3, 1651, with a Parliamentarian victory.

historicEvents.title: Glorious Revolution
historicEvents.description: The Glorious Revolution brought the downfall of Catholic King James II and the reign of his Protestant daughter Mary and her Dutch husband, William III of Orange.

en.lifeSummary: When Martha Baylie was born on 20 February 1609, in Framlingham, Suffolk, England, her father, Francis Baylie, was 23 and her mother, Dorothy Rossell, was 21. She married Deacon Edward Collins on 20 November 1628, in Framlingham, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 7 daughters. She died on 22 March 1699, in Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, at the age of 90, and was buried in Charlestown, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America.

ko.lifeSummary: Martha Baylie(이)가 1609년 2월 20일 영국 수폴크 프램링함에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Francis Baylie(은)는 23세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Dorothy Rossell(은)는 21세였다. 그녀는 1628년 11월 20일 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 프램링함에서 Deacon Edward Collins(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 일곱 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1699년 3월 22일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 수폴크에서 90세의 나이로 사망했으며 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 미들레세스 찰레스타운에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Martha Baylie nasceu em 20 de fevereiro de 1609, em Framlingham, Suffolk, Inglaterra, seu pai, Francis Baylie, tinha 23 anos e sua mãe, Dorothy Rossell, tinha 21 anos. Ela casou-se com Deacon Edward Collins em 20 de novembro de 1628, em Framlingham, Suffolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos e 7 filhas. Ela faleceu em 22 de março de 1699, em Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, com 90 anos, e foi sepultada em Charlestown, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Martha Baylie родилась 20 февраля 1609 г. в местности фрамлингхам, суффолк, Англия, её отцу по имени Francis Baylie было 23 года, а матери, которую звали Dorothy Rossell, 21. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Deacon Edward Collins 20 ноября 1628 г. в местности фрамлингхам, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 7 дочерей. Она умерла 22 марта 1699 г. в местности суффолк, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика в возрасте 90 лет и была похоронена в местности чарльстоун, миддлесекс, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Martha Baylie nació el 20 de febrero de 1609, en Framlingham, Suffolk, Inglaterra, su papá, Francis Baylie, tenía 23 años y su mamá, Dorothy Rossell, tenía 21 años. Se casó con Deacon Edward Collins el 20 de noviembre de 1628, en Framlingham, Suffolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 6 hijos y 7 hijas. Murió el 22 de marzo de 1699, en Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, a la edad de 90 años, y fue sepultada en Charlestown, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America.
